html:
Exclusive to:

“Cools the holder while they run.”

-

The Whirly Fan is an item in Don't Starve Together. It requires 3 Twigs and 1 Petals to craft. It grants low protection from Overheating while it is spinning. It will spin only while the player is running, causing the Whirly Fan to spin and cool down the player.

The Whirly Fan has a durability of 1 minute and 30 seconds, and the durability will only go down while it is spinning.

However, it should be noted that the durability will decrease by 1% when being equipped after the first time. This may be a bug.

Gallery

  • Wilson holding a Whirly Fan standing still.
  • Wilson running with a Whirly Fan.
  • The Whirly Fan in use.
  • Whirly Fan Dropped without shadow
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

"minifan"
“Somehow the breeze comes out the back twice as fast.”
–Wilson
“No fun, making me exercise to stay cool!”
–Willow
“It's so twirly when I run! Haha!”
–Wolfgang
“When I am still, it is as lifeless as Abigail.”
–Wendy
“DEFIES CONSERVATION OF ENERGY”
–WX-78
“Its aerodynamic principals are astonishing.”
–Wickerbottom
“I'm not used to the heat in this place!”
–Woodie
“This pathetic device... gets the job done.”
–Maxwell
“The chilling breeze reminds me öf my frigid höme.”
–Wigfrid
“It cools us when we run, how nice.”
–Webber
“Like a cool ocean breeze.”
–Warly
“Wheeee!”
–Wormwood
“Swirly.”
–Winona
“Round and round and round it goes.”
–Wortox
“Hee-hee-hee!”
–Wurt
“Those are for little kids!”
–Walter
“You're never too old for a bit of fun!”
–Wanda
“Cools the holder while they run.”
-
The Whirly Fan is an item in Don't Starve Together. It requires 3 Twigs and 1 Petals to craft. It grants low protection from Overheating while it is spinning. It will spin only while the player is running, causing the Whirly Fan to spin and cool down the player.
The Whirly Fan has a durability of 1 minute and 30 seconds, and the durability will only go down while it is spinning.
However, it should be noted that the durability will decrease by 1% when being equipped after the first time. This may be a bug.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Quạt Gió là một vật phẩm trong Don't Starve Together. Nó cần 3 Cành Cây và 1 Cánh Hoa để chế tạo. Nó có khả năng bảo vệ thấp khỏi quá nóng khi đang quay. Nó sẽ chỉ quay khi người chơi đang chạy, khiến Whirly Fan quay và hạ nhiệt cho người chơi.

The '''Whirly Fan''' is an item in ''[[Don't Starve Together]].'' It requires 3 [[Twigs]] and 1 [[Petals]] to craft. It grants low protection from [[Overheating]] while it is spinning. It will spin only while the player is running, causing the Whirly Fan to spin and cool down the player.

The Whirly Fan has a durability of 1 minute and 30 seconds, and the durability will only go down while it is spinning.

However, it should be noted that the durability will decrease by 1% when being equipped after the first time. This may be a bug.
